kept.text: Today, we committed an additional $4.5B across two of our Lebanon, Indiana, sites — bringing our total Indiana commitment to more than $21B since 2020. We also opened Lilly Lebanon Advanced Therapies, our first dedicated genetic medicine manufacturing facility. #WeAreLilly #Lilly150

kept.text:
An analyst asked $NVO what the company is hearing from doctors and patients following the launch of $LLY  obesity pill Foundayo.

US executive Jamey Millar said it is still “early days,” but that Novo so far sees confirmation of the strength of oral Wegovy’s profile.

He said efficacy remains the primary decision factor for patients and argued that oral Wegovy has “unmatched efficacy.”

“What we have heard in the market is consistent with the strength of our profile,” he said.
